chat.title: RAG Legal Chatbot
chat.subtitle: TF-IDF retrieval + Gemini response + legal action suggestions
chat.example: Example: "Mera mobile chori ho gaya kya karu?"
chat.initialExplanation: Namaste. Main aapka legal assistant hoon. Aap railway rules, property agreement, ya stolen items ke baare mein puch sakte hain.
chat.initialRule2: Indian context me practical guidance milegi.
chat.initialGuidance: Agar matter urgent ho to lawyer ya local authorities se baat karein.
chat.loading: Relevant legal context fetch karke answer prepare ho raha hai...
chat.disclaimer: AI guidance final legal opinion nahi hai. Urgent matters ke liye lawyer ya local authorities se baat karein.
chat.errorMessage: Assistant abhi available nahi hai. Thodi der baad try kijiye.
chat.errorGuidance: Agar issue urgent hai to legal expert se consult karein.

fir.title: FIR / Complaint Generator
fir.subtitle: Apni problem simple language me likhiye aur ready-to-submit complaint banaiye.
fir.placeholder: Incident details simple language me likhiye...
